limitation: Hashes, source-level runtimeModelBom, lockfile SBOM, local build provenance, and offline eval diff cover repository inputs only. Live provider model versions, live model-output eval, and CI-signed provenance remain separate release evidence.

runtimeModelBom.limitation: Extracted from source literals only; it does not attest live provider routing, deployed environment overrides, endpoint model hashes, or provider-side version aliases.

sbom.limitation: Lockfile-derived SBOM evidence only. Licenses and resolved URLs are copied from package-lock/package metadata and are not a live registry attestation.

buildProvenance.limitation: Local unsigned provenance evidence. It records repository inputs and build intent, but it is not a CI-signed SLSA attestation.

matchedTerms: 본문을 직접 고치지 않는 리포트 전용
No prose, no markdown fences, no commentary
説明・注釈・markdown コードブロック禁止
禁止说明、注释、markdown 代码块
Output ONLY the final translated text
Use exactly the field names specified in the prompt

offlineEvalDiff.limitation: Deterministic offline prompt/source contract eval only. It does not execute live provider model outputs or compare provider-side behavior.
